name: Xero
description: Connects to the Xero Accounting API v2 to sync invoices, contacts, and accounts into the Shielva knowledge base. Uses OAuth2 PKCE flow for secure authorization.

install_fields.label: Client ID
install_fields.placeholder: Enter your Xero OAuth2 Client ID
install_fields.help: Found in the Xero Developer Portal under your app's OAuth 2.0 credentials.

install_fields.label: Client Secret
install_fields.placeholder: Enter your Xero OAuth2 Client Secret
install_fields.help: Found alongside the Client ID in the Xero Developer Portal. Stored encrypted.

install_fields.label: Redirect URI
install_fields.help: The OAuth2 callback URI. Must match exactly one of the redirect URIs registered in your Xero app. Leave blank to use the Shielva platform default.

install_fields.label: Xero Tenant ID
install_fields.help: The Xero organisation (tenant) ID. Set automatically after OAuth2 authorization from GET /connections. Only fill in manually if you need to target a specific organisation.

methods.name: Install / Validate
methods.description: Validate that client_id and client_secret are present. Returns HEALTHY/PENDING — OAuth must be completed to fully connect.

methods.name: Get Authorization URL
methods.description: Build and return the Xero OAuth2 PKCE authorization URL. Direct users to this URL to grant access.

methods.name: Exchange Authorization Code
methods.description: Exchange the OAuth2 code from the callback for access + refresh tokens. Also fetches and stores xero_tenant_id.

methods.name: Refresh Access Token
methods.description: Use the stored refresh token to obtain a new access token.

methods.name: Health Check
methods.description: Ping GET /Organisation and return HEALTHY, DEGRADED, or OFFLINE with organisation name.

methods.name: Sync
methods.description: Full or incremental sync of invoices, contacts, and accounts into the knowledge base.

methods.name: List Invoices
methods.description: Paginated list of Xero invoices. Supports If-Modified-Since for incremental fetch.

methods.name: Get Invoice
methods.description: Retrieve a single invoice by InvoiceID.

methods.name: List Contacts
methods.description: Paginated list of Xero contacts. Supports If-Modified-Since for incremental fetch.

methods.name: Get Contact
methods.description: Retrieve a single contact by ContactID.

methods.name: Get Connections
methods.description: GET https://api.xero.com/connections — returns list of Xero tenants the user is connected to. No Xero-Tenant-Id header required.
